title: Travel Makeup Bag [with Brushes Holder & Detachable Pouch] Cosmetic Bag Large Capacity Waterproof Makeup Case Storage Organiser for Women & Girls (Pink)
features: 👜【 2-IN-1 Makeup Bag 】 This large makeup bag comes with an extra detachable small cute pouch (with 2 compartments) to store small items like lipstick, tweezers, jewelry and more

👜【 Premiun Material 】 The cosmetic bag is water-resistant, shockproof and touch soft. The outside is made of splash-resistant oxford fabric; inside waterproof leather for easy cleaning. Thickened sponge liner provides more protection for your cosmetics

👜【 Practical Design 】 The portable makeup storage case designed with 6 brushes slots to keep makeup tool accessories organized and convinient to access. The baffle is dustproof, waterproof, easy to wipe, keep your bag and brushes clean

👜【 Travel Makeup Organiser 】 Our cosmetic bag with handle is lightweight and portable. It can be stacked in suitcase easily for it's rectangular shape and take not much space for it's medium size. Perfect for travel and daily use

👜【 Multifunctional Storage Bag 】 Not just a makeup bag, but a toiletry bag, medical bag, electronic bag, nail art kits bag, essential oils bag, travel bag, camera bag, etc. Ideal gift for makeup lovers, friends and family
description: Product Description Waterproof Materical The outside and inside of the cosmetic bag are waterproof fabric, soft to the touch, waterproof PU lining for easy cleaning. Double Zippers The zipper of the makeup bag features a double-way zipper that is very smooth and easy to use. Comfortable handle Sturdy handle makes cosmetic bag easy to carry and hang up with you. Strong Practicability This multifunctional makeup bag that can be used as nail art kits bag,storage bag,toiletry bag,electronic bag.
